payload.event_name: Unleash HER Full Potential with EWT SELF-CARE HOUR
payload.description: Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) hosted a self-care hour exploring Professional, Physical, Fiscal, Mental and Wisdom Wellness at 2 Broadway - 20th Fl, with virtual option via Zoom

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: All Generational ERG Back to School Event

payload.description: In celebration of Intergenerational month, the All Generational ERG created a 'First Day of School' presentation. Employees shared pictures of children's first day back to school, compiled into an agencywide video.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: Cafecito Chat with MTA Chief Administrative Officer Lisette Camilo as Keynote Speaker, interviewed by Gabriella Palencia, Executive Agency Counsel. Lisette shared her career trajectory and answered employee questions on career advancement.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Second Cafecito Chat with Chris Pangilinan

payload.description: Second Cafecito Chat hosted by Latino & Friends and Abilities Employee Resource Groups. Daisy Mendez interviewed Chris Pangilinan, Vice President of Paratransit, who shared insight on navigating a large organization and core skills for career advancement.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: A fun and exciting FREE 4-week program where MTA colleagues connect to practice conversational Spanish. Latinos & Friends paired Spanish Language beginners with fluent Spanish speaking colleagues.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Veterans ERG Suicide Prevention Awareness Event

payload.event_name: September is Suicide Prevention Awareness Month Discussion
payload.description: The Veterans Employee Resource Group held a discussion to bring awareness to the struggles that veterans face at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Conference Rm. MTA's Work Life Services and Local U.S. Veterans Affairs Representatives were present to speak and share resources.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.claim_text: MNR's 3rd Quarter workforce increased by 47 employees.
Female representation decreased by 2% with a net change of 88 employees.

tool_args.label: MNR Minority Representation Remained Constant 3Q2022 vs 2Q2022

payload.claim_text: Minority representation remained constant at 40% with a net of 37 employees.

tool_args.label: MNR Female Workforce Percentage Decreased 3Q2022 vs 2Q2022

payload.claim_text: The percentage of females employed in the workforce has decreased when compared to 2nd Quarter 2022.

tool_args.label: MNR Minority Percentage Remained Constant 3Q2022 vs 2Q2022

payload.claim_text: The percentage of minorities in the workforce has remained constant when compared to 2nd Quarter 2022.
